note: SVD truncate all 4 attn projections in throat, fine-tune norms+KV 200 steps, eval. Verified actual rank stays high after fine-tune (fine-tuning rebuilds rank). Process killed at rank 3 due to SVD on 5120x5120 taking hours on CPU.
conclusion: Throat attention projections on 14B can be annealed from rank 1280 down to rank 5 without quality loss. Every rank from 896 to 5 stays at or below baseline ppl (16.4). Some ranks IMPROVE (640=13.2, best). Fine-tuning rebuilds rank after SVD truncation, so the test measures 'can the model pass through a rank-k bottleneck and recover' rather than 'does rank-k inference work'. Spikes at ranks 160 and 56 are temporary — next step always recovers. Killed at rank 3 due to CPU SVD bottleneck on 5120x5120 matrices.
comparison_06b: Mac found 0.6B degrades monotonically: rank 640 = ppl 93, rank 512 = ppl 146. 14B at rank 5 = ppl 15.2 (below baseline). Scale matters enormously — d=5120 has the headroom that d=1024 lacks.
